name: Hastings Technology Metals Ltd
description: Hastings Technology Metals Ltd is an Australian rare earths company focused on the development of its flagship Yangibana Rare Earths Project in the Gascoyne region of Western Australia. The project is poised to become a significant producer of neodymium and praseodymium (NdPr), which are critical materials used in the manufacture of permanent magnets for electric vehicles, wind turbines, and other advanced technologies. Hastings is committed to sustainable and responsible mining practices as it works to supply the global green energy transition.
